<div class="theme-grid">

<a class="theme-card" href="themes/economy.html" style="--theme-color: #2E6F40">
  <h3>Economy &amp; Stock Market</h3>
  <div class="n">1,994 posts</div>
  <div class="desc">Markets, GDP, the Dow, Fed policy, inflation, economic growth.</div>
</a>


<a class="theme-card" href="themes/border.html" style="--theme-color: #8C5E2A">
  <h3>Border &amp; Immigration</h3>
  <div class="n">2,382 posts</div>
  <div class="desc">The wall, caravans, asylum, ICE, sanctuary cities, illegal immigration.</div>
</a>


<a class="theme-card" href="themes/media.html" style="--theme-color: #3F5F7F">
  <h3>Media</h3>
  <div class="n">7,494 posts</div>
  <div class="desc">Fake news, specific networks/reporters, press, enemy of the people.</div>
</a>


<a class="theme-card" href="themes/elections.html" style="--theme-color: #6B3F72">
  <h3>Elections &amp; Voting</h3>
  <div class="n">4,000 posts</div>
  <div class="desc">Campaigns, polling, voter fraud, mail-in ballots, election integrity.</div>
</a>


<a class="theme-card" href="themes/china.html" style="--theme-color: #A63D2A">
  <h3>China</h3>
  <div class="n">1,136 posts</div>
  <div class="desc">Xi, trade war, tariffs on China, COVID origins, Chinese currency.</div>
</a>


<a class="theme-card" href="themes/military.html" style="--theme-color: #4A5C3A">
  <h3>Military &amp; Veterans</h3>
  <div class="n">1,504 posts</div>
  <div class="desc">Troops, generals, VA, military parades, defense spending.</div>
</a>


<a class="theme-card" href="themes/energy.html" style="--theme-color: #B08030">
  <h3>Energy</h3>
  <div class="n">1,433 posts</div>
  <div class="desc">Oil, drilling, pipelines, coal, Green New Deal, gas prices.</div>
</a>


<a class="theme-card" href="themes/courts.html" style="--theme-color: #5D3A5D">
  <h3>Courts, Judges &amp; Legal Cases</h3>
  <div class="n">5,154 posts</div>
  <div class="desc">Supreme Court, Mueller, impeachment, indictments, witch hunt.</div>
</a>


<a class="theme-card" href="themes/jobs.html" style="--theme-color: #2F5F5F">
  <h3>Jobs &amp; Manufacturing</h3>
  <div class="n">1,620 posts</div>
  <div class="desc">Factory openings, jobs numbers, USMCA, American workers.</div>
</a>


<a class="theme-card" href="themes/crime.html" style="--theme-color: #7A3030">
  <h3>Crime &amp; Law Enforcement</h3>
  <div class="n">1,664 posts</div>
  <div class="desc">Police, violence, gangs, chaos in Democrat cities, law and order.</div>
</a>


<a class="theme-card" href="themes/covid.html" style="--theme-color: #4B6A88">
  <h3>COVID / Health</h3>
  <div class="n">1,257 posts</div>
  <div class="desc">Pandemic, vaccines, Operation Warp Speed, Fauci, lockdowns.</div>
</a>


<a class="theme-card" href="themes/trade.html" style="--theme-color: #997A2E">
  <h3>Trade &amp; Tariffs</h3>
  <div class="n">810 posts</div>
  <div class="desc">Tariffs (beyond China), NAFTA, trade imbalances, WTO.</div>
</a>


<a class="theme-card" href="themes/foreign_policy.html" style="--theme-color: #415B6F">
  <h3>Foreign Policy</h3>
  <div class="n">2,108 posts</div>
  <div class="desc">Russia, Ukraine, Israel, NATO, Iran, North Korea.</div>
</a>


<a class="theme-card" href="themes/personal_family.html" style="--theme-color: #6E4C7A">
  <h3>Personal &amp; Family</h3>
  <div class="n">11,388 posts</div>
  <div class="desc">Melania, Ivanka, Don Jr., Eric, Barron, Tiffany, family moments.</div>
</a>


<a class="theme-card" href="themes/nicknames_bad.html" style="--theme-color: #8B1E3F">
  <h3>Bad Nicknames</h3>
  <div class="n">15,262 posts</div>
  <div class="desc">Pejorative nicknames: Crooked Hillary, Sleepy Joe, Little Marco, etc.</div>
</a>


<a class="theme-card" href="themes/nicknames_good.html" style="--theme-color: #C9A961">
  <h3>Good Nicknames</h3>
  <div class="n">587 posts</div>
  <div class="desc">Affectionate or positive nicknames for allies and family.</div>
</a>


<a class="theme-card" href="themes/rallies.html" style="--theme-color: #8B5E2A">
  <h3>Rallies &amp; Campaign</h3>
  <div class="n">5,843 posts</div>
  <div class="desc">Rally crowds, campaign travel, MAGA movement, 2024/2016 runs.</div>
</a>


<a class="theme-card" href="themes/lifestyle.html" style="--theme-color: #5E7A4C">
  <h3>Golf, Mar-a-Lago &amp; Lifestyle</h3>
  <div class="n">5,837 posts</div>
  <div class="desc">Golf courses, Mar-a-Lago events, properties, Trump Tower, leisure.</div>
</a>

</div>
<p class="muted">Uncategorized: 9,727 posts. Total assigned: 81,200.</p>
